channels.name: Cold Email Draft
channels.policy: Draft only. Requires SPF/DKIM/DMARC, opt-out, manual founder send. Never auto-sent.

channels.name: Follow-up Draft
channels.policy: Draft only. Sent manually by founder after a prior legitimate touch.

channels.name: LinkedIn Manual Draft
channels.policy: Manual copy/paste by founder only. No automation, no auto-connect, no bots.

channels.name: Website / Contact Form Draft
channels.policy: Reply/intake copy only. No auto-submit, no form-filling bots.
